title: uragoga microcephala
side_effects: Uragoga microcephala can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, dizziness, and stomach upset in some individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of uragoga microcephala extracts may lead to kidney damage, liver toxicity, and an increased risk of bleeding. In rare cases, improper use of this plant has been associated with allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and respiratory issues. It is essential to consult with a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using uragoga microcephala for any health purposes.
